seo.title: Features | NamThuEdu
seo.description: Discover NamThuEdu's English learning features: VSTEP-standard practice tests, personalized study paths, and teachers who respond within 24 hours.

hero.sub: A comprehensive English learning platform — VSTEP-standard tests, personalized paths, and teacher feedback within 24 hours.

commitments: Writing & Speaking feedback within 24 hours — we won't keep you waiting.
Teachers stay with you throughout the course, not just teach and disappear.
Transparent pricing from day one — no hidden fees or upsell packages.

items.title: VSTEP-Standard Tests
items.desc: Ministry-approved question bank covering all 4 skills: Listening, Speaking, Reading, Writing — updated regularly.

items.title: Personalized Path
items.desc: A placement test identifies your level and automatically recommends the best learning path for your goals.

items.title: Dedicated Teachers
items.desc: Writing graded and Speaking reviewed within 24 hours. Teachers support you directly — no learning alone.

items.title: Progress Tracking
items.desc: Score charts for each skill, study time, and clear strengths/weaknesses — always know where you stand.

items.title: Rich Article Library
items.desc: Grammar, vocabulary, and exam tips from our teachers — free to read, no sign-up required.

items.title: Learn Anytime, Anywhere
items.desc: Optimized for mobile and desktop. No app install needed — open in any browser and go.

comparison.title: Built to solve real learner challenges
traditional: Not sure where to start or what level to begin at
Submit work and wait days before getting any feedback
Group classes move at one pace, easy to fall behind
Hard to tell if you're actually improving week to week
Unclear total cost, worried about unexpected fees
namthu: Fair pricing, clear from the start

quote.text: Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire.

items.a: Students preparing for VSTEP B1–C1, IELTS, or general communication English. Especially suitable for students, university learners, and working adults in Can Tho.

items.q: Can I try before signing up?
items.a: Yes. The article library and some sample tests are open for free so you can experience it before deciding.
Pricing is flexible depending on course and goals. Contact us directly for a recommended path and a quote.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: NamThu Education is committed to protecting your privacy. This document describes how we collect, use and protect your personal information.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body: When you register or use NamThuEdu, we may collect: full name, email, phone number, device info, and learning data (progress, scores, test history). We only collect information necessary to provide and improve our service.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Information
sections.body: Your information is used to: create and manage student accounts, track learning progress, send course-related notifications, provide technical support, and improve platform quality. We do not use personal data for third-party advertising.

sections.title: 3. Data Security
sections.body: NamThuEdu applies industry-standard security: HTTPS encryption, bcrypt password storage, and role-based internal access control. However, no system is 100% secure — you are responsible for protecting your login credentials.

sections.title: 4. Information Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell or rent your personal information. Data is only shared with the teacher assigned to your class, and when required by law. Parents of students under 18 may request to view learning data.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to: access and edit personal information, request account deletion, and opt out of marketing emails (except essential account emails). To exercise these rights, contact hello@namthu.vn.

sections.title: 6. Cookies & Sessions
sections.body: NamThuEdu uses cookies to maintain login sessions and remember language preferences. You may disable cookies in your browser, but this may affect your user experience.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Please read these terms carefully before using the NamThuEdu learning platform. Using our service means you accept these terms.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By creating an account or using NamThuEdu, you agree to comply with these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service. We may update terms and will notify you by email of significant changes.

sections.title: 2. User Accounts
sections.body: Each student may only create one account. You are responsible for your password security and all activity from your account. Accounts may not be transferred or shared. Students under 13 require parental consent.

sections.title: 3. Content & Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on NamThuEdu (lessons, exams, materials, UI) belongs to NamThu Education and is protected by intellectual property law. You may use it for personal learning only. Copying, redistribution, or commercial use without written permission is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: 4. Tuition & Payment
sections.body: Tuition is disclosed before enrollment. We may adjust fees with at least 30 days' notice. Refund policy: within the first 7 days if you have completed less than 20% of the course, a full refund can be requested.

sections.title: 5. Prohibited Conduct
sections.body: Strictly prohibited: cheating on exams, sharing exam content externally, using another person's account, posting offensive content, spamming, or attempting to breach the system. Violations may result in permanent account termination without refund.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: NamThuEdu provides services as-is and does not guarantee 100% uptime. We are not liable for indirect damages arising from use or inability to use the service. Maximum liability does not exceed fees paid in the last 3 months.
